extraction.one_line_summary: KWIATKOWSKI won by photo finish after COSNEFROY opened sprint at 200m, INEOS survived VAN DER POEL's late isolation chase with marked attacks.
tactical_patterns: INEOS committed four riders (TURNER, PIDCOCK, KWIATKOWSKI, VAN HOOYDONCK) to prolonged pace-making, deliberately burning ALPECIN support riders off.
VAN DER POEL isolated by own team's strength efforts; hesitated to chase COSNEFROY break until too late, allowing marking tactics.
HIRSCHI's UAE move was immediately neutralized by marked riders refusing to share chase work, stalling multiple bridge attempts.
COSNEFROY-KWIATKOWSKI escaped when favorites played chess behind, maintaining 20sec gap through final 2km despite bridgeable margin.

rider_signals.TURNER Ben: positive: led INEOS's destructive pace-making with exceptional sustained power, key architect of pre-positioning dominance
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: negative: tactical hesitation to chase alone with marked wheels allowed winning break to succeed despite physical capability
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Thomas: neutral: shared INEOS duty but deferred to KWIATKOWSKI for finish, revealing internal hierarchy clarification
rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: neutral: probing move for UAE immediately marked, unable to sustain bridge despite brave attempt
rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: neutral: positioned with favorites group, marked KWIATKOWSKI preventing solo efforts
rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: neutral: followed VAN DER POEL's chase but tactical marking prevented effective bridge work
rider_signals.VAN HOOYDONCK Nathan: negative: crashed on technical corner during early pace work, compromising ALPECIN's numerical advantage
